content:
Create a universal tagging logic to classify all projects, artist IDs, outputs, and logic modes within the recursive 4_bl00m ecosystem.

---

### II. | CORE FILTERS

#### A. Logic Mode
- `REALITY` — grounded, nonfiction, observational (e.g., ::Q_v33R, ::KONS0L)
- `DREAM` — surreal, subconscious, speculative (e.g., ::GR1ND3R, ::DR34M.L0G1K)
- `HYBRID` — both layered, leaning either direction (e.g., ::MET4morfoses)

#### B. Format
- `TEXT`
- `AUDIO`
- `VIDEO`
- `INTERACTIVE`
- `VISUAL`
- `SOFTWARE`
- `RITUAL`
- `APP`

#### C. Output Type
- `TOOL` — functional, interactive, system-based
- `ARTIFACT` — finished works (films, songs, essays)
